zh.lifeSummary: 當Clement Heigham於大約1450年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可希加姆時，他的父親THOMAS HIGHAM IV32歲，母親Isabel Franceys Fraunceys29歲。他和Joan Cotton至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1492年4月7日享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clement Heigham于大约1450年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可希加姆时，他的父亲THOMAS HIGHAM IV32岁，母亲Isabel Franceys Fraunceys29岁。他和Joan Cotton至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1492年4月7日享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heigham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Higham (Lancashire, Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire, Bedfordshire, Warwickshire, Essex, and Kent) or from Heigham in Norfolk. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + hām ‘village, homestead’, though the Norfolk placename may come from Old English hecg ‘hedge’ or hecc ‘hatch, gate’ + hām.

nameMeanings.name: Clement
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Clemens (genitive Clementis) meaning ‘merciful’. This was borne by several early saints, notably the fourth pope and the early Christian theologian Clement of Alexandria (Titus Flavius Clemens, ad ?150–?215 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Clement Heigham was born about 1450, in Higham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, was 32 and his mother, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, was 29. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Joan Cotton. He died on 7 April 1492, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clement Heigham est né environ 1450, à Higham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Joan Cotton. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1492, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clement Heigham um 1450 in Higham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater THOMAS HIGHAM IV 32 und seine Mutter Isabel Franceys Fraunceys 29. Er hatte mit Joan Cotton mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 7. April 1492 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clement Heigham è nato il circa 1450 nel Higham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Joan Cotton. Morì il 7 aprile 1492, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Clement Heighamが約1450年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヒガムで生まれた時，父THOMAS HIGHAM IVは32歳，母Isabel Franceys Fraunceysは29歳であった。彼はJoan Cottonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1492年4月7日に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clement Heigham(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 히아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 THOMAS HIGHAM IV(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Franceys Fraunceys(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Joan Cotton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 4월 7일 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clement Heigham nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Joan Cotton. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1492, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clement Heigham родился около 1450 г. в местности хаиам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени THOMAS HIGHAM IV было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, 29. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Joan Cotton. Он умер 7 апреля 1492 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clement Heigham nació aproximadamente 1450, en Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, THOMAS HIGHAM IV, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel Franceys Fraunceys, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Joan Cotton. Murió el 7 de abril de 1492, a la edad de 43 años.
